step_rationale: CD45 receptor; immune-signaling hub gene in AMI with chronic renal failure, enabling leukocyte function.
mechanism: PTPRC (CD45) is a leukocyte-signaling hub gene dysregulated in acute MI with concurrent chronic renal failure.

references.title: Multiomics Analysis Identifies Candidate Molecular, Microbiota, and Metabolite Features Associated with Acute Myocardial Infarction Combined with Chronic Renal Failure.
references.journal: Omics : a journal of integrative biology
